header.description: Single transaction record with payment acknowledgment details

rows.description: No detail rows required for this receipt

semantics: Single-record transaction receipt filtered by transaction_ref_number parameter. All data sourced from transactions table.
transformations: Format timestamp from created_at as readable timestamp for header display
Format transaction_date_time from transaction_date in DD/MM/YYYY HH:MM:SS format
Format access_time from access_timestamp with IST timezone suffix
Format bill_amount as currency with 2 decimal places
